final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: e-commerce hero image, square crop
Primary request: skincare set product shot with natural ingredients concept, emphasizing texture and premium quality
Scene/backdrop: frosted glass tabletop, soft-focus green plants and morning mist in background
Subject: skincare set products arranged neatly in a row, minimalist packaging, clean lines
Style/medium: commercial product photography, high-end cosmetic advertising
Composition/framing: eye-level straight-on shot, centered arrangement, shallow depth of field
Lighting/mood: softbox lighting, soft diffused light, gentle shadows, serene and natural atmosphere
Color palette: muted greens, soft whites, translucent glass tones, natural skin tones
Materials/textures: frosted glass surface with subtle reflections, matte product packaging, delicate mist texture
Constraints: keep products as focal point with visible branding area, maintain clean and premium aesthetic
Avoid: harsh shadows, oversaturated colors, cluttered background, plastic-looking materials, watermark
